25 
CLM_FAC_TYPE_CD 
LABEL: 
Claim Facility Type Code 
DESCRIPTION: The type of facility. 
SHORT NAME: CLM_FAC_TYPE_CD 
LONG NAME: CLM_FAC_TYPE_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 
FILE(S): 
IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
VALUES: 
1 = 
Hospital 
2 = 
Skilled Nursing Facility (SNF) 
3 = 
home health Agency (HHA) 
4 = 
Religious Non-medical
